notes: Machine-readable index of every dataset in this mod. Adds three craftable items (monomer, plastic, composite plastic) and ships zero new blocks — crafting is handled by vanilla Smelter 2.5 m (monomer, plastic) and Assembler 5 m (composite plastic), matching the Backpack Upgrades precedent of a block-less mod. SCOPE BOUNDARY: this repo is 'chemistry & plastics' — polymer-chain only. Adjacent chemistry domains (solvents, adhesives, synthetic fuels, fibers, ceramics) belong in separate mods, not here. FIRST MOD WITH CROSS-MOD ID REFERENCES: monomer's recipes reach into Forestry's `resin` and Petroleum Power's `gasoline` ids, so the validator walks those sibling repos (graceful skip when absent, same pattern as BASE_GAME_REPO). Plastic and composite plastic ship with `usedIn: []` and a `dataGaps` note — no current mod consumes them; future Electronics / Packaging / Food / Clothing mods are expected to reference these ids by name.

datasets.description: Monomer (Smelter intermediate, dual bio/petro feedstock), Plastic (Smelter bulk soft material), Composite Plastic (Assembler reinforced rigid material).
